purpose: Determine whether adjacent failed placements should be repaired and accepted as atomic neighborhoods.

variants.name: secondary_failure_over_grouping
variants.neighborhood_policy: group adjacent placements when any performance, speaker, transition, masking, or residue failure is present

variants.name: primary_strategy_evidence_gate
variants.neighborhood_policy: group only when the routed primary repair strategy requires shared performance, speaker, transition, suppression, or masking context

conclusion: Retain coordinated repair neighborhoods, but activate them only from the primary routed strategy. Secondary mismatch annotations are not sufficient evidence for atomic grouping. This benchmark is dominated by sentence-boundary repair, so dedicated strategy-isolation excerpts are required to evaluate coordinated performance repairs.
